# PERF-196 negative: JWT parse lives in a middleware that caches the result
lang: go
file: PERF-196-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
)

type ctxKey struct{}

func AuthMiddleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		tok := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
		claims := &Claims{}
		parsed, _ := jwt.ParseWithClaims(tok, claims, func(t *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
			return []byte("secret"), nil
		})
		if parsed != nil {
			r = r.WithContext(context.WithValue(r.Context(), ctxKey{}, claims))
		}
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}

type Claims struct {
	UserID string `json:"user_id"`
	jwt.RegisteredClaims
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.Context().Value(ctxKey{})
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
